name: python3-colored-traceback
title: python3-colored-traceback
description:
Colorization for Python 3 tracebacks
Automatically colorize Python's uncaught exception tracebacks.
colored_traceback can be used both as module or as executable.
The colorization is done with pygments.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-colored-traceback because Colorization for Python 3 tracebacks.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-colored-traceback as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-colored-traceback with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-colored-traceback --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
